name: Bioline Chicken & Salmon Cat Snacks 15g * 5
shortDescription: Bioline chicken and salmon cat snacks is a selection of high-quality chicken and delicious salmon, cooked at high temperatures, ground in the form of pulp, good taste, and can be easily digested and absorbed.
description: Bioline chicken and salmon pet snacks is a selection of high-quality chicken and delicious salmon, cooked at high temperatures, ground in the form of pulp, good taste, and can be easily digested and absorbed. Main Ingredients : Water, Fish (Salmon), Frozen Chicken Breast 28%, Corn Starch. Additives : Xanthan Gum, Taurine, Vitamin A, Vitamin D, Vitamin E Application : For Cats up-to 3 months old Storage Conditions : Please Keep in a cool and dry place below 25C, avoid direct sunlight. Instructions for Use : Can be added to food or given orally to Cats.
